project_name: MA LAKSHMI RADIO SALES & SERVICE - Showroom UI
design_philosophy: Bright retail shopping aesthetic inspired by Amazon/Flipkart. High-visibility, hyper-functional, and conversion-focused. Replaces standard e-commerce carts with direct WhatsApp/Call lead generation. Emphasizes product density, clear categorization, and strong CTAs over decorative whitespace.

typography.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none text-slate-900
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900

product_card.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow duration-300 flex flex-col h-full
product_card.image_container: w-full aspect-[4/3] bg-slate-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 relative
product_card.title: text-sm sm:text-base font-bold text-slate-900 line-clamp-2 mb-2
product_card.cta_button: w-full bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600 text-white flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2.5 rounded text-sm font-bold transition-colors

category_nav_bar.style: bg-white border-b border-slate-200 w-full overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar
category_nav_bar.item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-w-[80px] p-2 hover:text-blue-600 cursor-pointer transition-colors text-slate-600
category_nav_bar.icon_container: w-12 h-12 bg-slate-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-1 hover:bg-blue-50 transition-colors

search_bar.container: flex w-full max-w-2xl border-2 border-yellow-400 rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-white focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-yellow-400/50
search_bar.input: w-full px-4 py-2.5 text-slate-900 focus:outline-none text-sm
search_bar.button: bg-yellow-400 hover:bg-yellow-500 text-slate-900 px-6 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-center transition-colors

utility_bar.style: bg-slate-900 text-slate-300 text-xs py-1.5 hidden sm:block
utility_bar.link: hover:text-white transition-colors cursor-pointer inline-flex items-center gap-1

header.structure: Sticky top-0 z-50 shadow-sm. Contains Top Utility Bar, Main Header (Logo, Search, Contacts), and Category Bottom Bar.
header.logo: Text-based. 'MA LAKSHMI' in heavy black font, 'RADIO SALES & SERVICE' smaller below. Accent yellow dot.

hero_carousel.structure: Full-width carousel just below header. High-impact promotional banners. Auto-playing. Use Lucide icons for navigation arrows.
hero_carousel.aspect_ratio: aspect-[16/9] sm:aspect-[21/9] w-full relative overflow-hidden bg-slate-100

feature_strip.structure: Grid of 4-5 items (Free Delivery, EMI, Installation, Warranty) placed right under hero. bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-4 mx-4 sm:mx-0 mt-[-20px] relative z-10 shadow-sm flex flex-wrap justify-between gap-4

product_showcase_grids.structure: Bento Grid / Compact Retail Grid style. grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5. Very tight gaps (gap-3 or gap-4) to simulate Amazon-density.
product_showcase_grids.header: Flex row with Category Title (H3) and 'View All' link.

brand_showcase.structure: Horizontal scrolling marquee (use react-fast-marquee or CSS animation) of plain text/SVG logos of top brands (Sony, LG, Samsung, Whirlpool, Voltas). Grayscale, hover to color.

b2b_section.structure: Full width banner with dark background (bg-slate-900). Highlights corporate orders, hotel setups, bulk AC installations. High contrast yellow CTA button.

contact_and_footer.structure: Map embed on one side, clean contact form / store info on the other. Footer with deep slate background, white links.

floating_actions.structure: Fixed bottom-right column. WhatsApp icon (Green, bouncing slightly) and Phone icon (Blue). Only visible when scrolled past header.

animations.hover_states: All buttons should have a slight scale (active:scale-95) and color darken.
animations.carousel: Smooth slide transition (Framer Motion or native CSS scroll snap).
animations.marquee: Continuous slow linear slide for brand logos.

hero_banners.description: Premium promotional hero background featuring TV, washing machine, and fridge. Best for slide 1.
Showroom interior wide shot. Best for slide 2 (Store visit promo).

category_images.description: Modern living room. Use for TV/Audio category banner.
Modern kitchen. Use for Kitchen appliances category banner.

product_placeholders.description: High-res transparent AC unit for featured product.
High-res transparent Refrigerator for featured product.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all UI icons (Search, Menu, Phone, ShoppingBag, Truck, Shield, Wrench, ChevronDown, CheckCircle). For WhatsApp, use a custom SVG if lucide-react doesn't have a good one, or just use the generic MessageCircle icon styled green.

testing.requirements: Every interactive element (buttons, category links, product cards, search bar, carousel arrows) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='hero-carousel-next', data-testid='product-card-whatsapp-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install lucide-react, framer-motion, and react-fast-marquee (if needed for brand slider).
Use standard HTML tags tailored with Tailwind classes for layouts rather than complex Shadcn layout components. Only use Shadcn for complex interactives like dialogs or dropdowns.
Ensure the Google Sheets CSV logic populates the product grids seamlessly. Map the columns strictly to Image, Title, Specs. Prices should NOT be displayed.
Make the sticky header robust: On mobile, condense the search and navigation to fit elegantly, perhaps using a hamburger menu for categories if they overflow.
For the brand showcase, since image logos are restricted, use stylized text in a row (e.g., SAMSUNG, LG, SONY, VOLTAS, WHIRLPOOL) rendered in a heavy font, grayscale, wrapping in a marquee.
Strictly follow the 'no prices, no cart' rule. The primary CTA on every product is 'Best Price on WhatsApp'.
